key_decisions.original_text: EIP-8282 builder deposit contract: keep static constants (no dynamic params); choose values carefully; Felix adds disable-switch for future upgrades
key_decisions.context: static constants instead of dynamic params; disable-switch for future upgrades

key_decisions.original_text: glamsterdam-devnet-7 adds no new EIPs; EL scope limited to refinements of existing EIPs
